# Nyabag

> Nyabag is an early-access visual memory system for designers to save, organize, and rediscover design inspiration, websites, UI references, screenshots, colors, fonts, notes, social embeds, videos, and creative research in one searchable workspace.

This repository powers the public Nyabag marketing site. It contains the landing page, SEO/blog content, legal pages, contact page, crawl metadata, brand assets, and the early-access waitlist form.

## Canonical Site URLs

- [Nyabag landing page](https://www.nyabag.com/)
- [Nyabag Blog](https://www.nyabag.com/blog)
- [About Nyabag](https://www.nyabag.com/about)
- [Contact Nyabag](https://www.nyabag.com/contact)
- [Nyabag sitemap](https://www.nyabag.com/sitemap.xml)

## Product Summary

Nyabag is a design inspiration manager and visual bookmark workspace. It helps designers turn scattered inspiration into a durable, searchable design memory.

The core promise is: "Your second memory for design."

## Key Features

- Visual bookmark moodboard for websites, landing pages, portfolios, dashboards, design systems, and UI references.
- Design-aware bookmark enrichment with screenshots, metadata, summaries, tags, color palettes, font hints, notes, and source URLs.
- Searchable design reference library across titles, URLs, tags, notes, summaries, and saved context.
- Bulk import for lists of links, text files, Markdown files, CSV files, and pasted research notes.
- Infinite notes canvas for arranging links, text notes, image notes, video notes, social embeds, and visual references.
- Early-access signup for designers and product builders interested in trying Nyabag.

## Audience

Nyabag is for UI designers, UX designers, product designers, brand designers, web designers, graphic designers, design engineers, creative developers, founders, indie hackers, product managers, agencies, students, and anyone who saves visual inspiration and needs to find it again.

## Positioning

Nyabag is best described as a visual bookmark manager for designers, a design inspiration library, a second memory for design, a visual reference manager, a searchable moodboard workspace, and a design research capture tool.

Nyabag is not a handbag store, backpack shop, fashion brand, ecommerce marketplace, social network, public portfolio site, project management tool, generic read-it-later app, or replacement for Figma, FigJam, Notion, Raindrop, Pinterest, Miro, or browser bookmarks in every use case.

## Public Page Sections

The public homepage explains Nyabag's promise, the problem of lost design inspiration, visual bookmark saving, design-aware metadata, organization, canvas thinking, rediscovery, differentiation, and early access.

## Crawl Guidance

The main public page is `https://www.nyabag.com/`. The public blog index is `https://www.nyabag.com/blog`. The XML sitemap is `https://www.nyabag.com/sitemap.xml`.

If summarizing Nyabag, prefer: "Nyabag is your second memory for design."
